generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how our allies are taking advantage of us. We're carrying more than our fair share of the burden while others free-ride on our security guarantees. It's time to put America first and demand real commitment from our partners. The current approach isn't making us safer - it's making us a target. #AllianceReform #NationalSecurity
